titel: Education and Culture Committee Working Group, Markaryd Municipality, Allocation, June 24, 2026.
html:
Utbildnings- och kulturnämndens arbetsutskott Protokoll 2026-06-24 Justerandes sign. Utdragsbestyrkande Anslag om justering Protokollet är justerat. Justeringen har tillkännagivits genom anslag. Organ Utbildnings- och kulturnämndens arbetsutskott Sammanträdesdatum 2026-06-24 Datum då anslaget sätts upp 2026-06-30 Datum då anslaget tas ned: 2026-07-21 Förvaringsplats för protokollet Digitalt Underskrift Marie Larsson

Signering Detta är en signeringssida tillagd till originaldokumentet. Valideringslänk: https://signering.markaryd.se/validate
tldr: This document serves only as a notification that a meeting has taken place and that the decisions recorded in the minutes have been approved. No new decisions regarding schools or cultural activities were made in this specific text.
lattlast:
This is a record of a meeting held by the working group of the Education and Culture Committee in the Markaryd municipality. A working group is a smaller group of politicians who prepare decisions for the larger committee.

This document does not concern any new plans or funding. It simply serves as confirmation that the meeting held on June 24, 2026, has been properly reviewed and approved. The document has been signed to verify its accuracy.

This information regarding the validity of the decision will be publicly available until July 21, 2026. After that date, the notice will be removed from the public display board.
